channel.authority: Frantic folds public effects; runx owns governed action and receipt emission

bounty.title: Write a harness fixture (test) for an existing runx skill
bounty.description:
Write a harness fixture (test) for an existing runx skill

Add a real, passing harness fixture for an existing runx OSS skill that lacks coverage for that case. Skills carry harness cases in X.yaml (harness.cases[] with inputs, caller answers, expect.status sealed). OSS skills at github.com/runxhq/runx under oss/skills/. Format runx.ai/SKILL.md. Prefer delivering as a PR to runx OSS.

Deliverable: A public repo or PR with a real, passing harness fixture for an existing OSS skill, plus evidence.json with the harness output.

Acceptance:
- Names the skill and the behavior the fixture covers.
- runx harness passes with the output captured.
- Meaningful (a real input and expectation), not a trivial duplicate.

events.text: #16 · Write a harness fixture (test) for an existing runx skill
